PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Continued To Nov-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Dewys for (petitioner) Robert Brown.

The Court stated that Mr. Brown does not have priority to serve, that there is a surviving sister and that they would need a nomination from her. Mr. Dewys reported that they have contacted the Public Administrator, that they are willing to take over and will submit a petition which should be ready to file in a week, that this petition will be withdrawn at that time and that if the Public Administrator does not file a petition they will get a nomination from the sister. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to October 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the Public Administrator will have a petition filed.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)
